calendar.matters:
Petition For Confirmation Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jan-06-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Leandro Duran for petitioner and trustee Bryan Caston, who was also present (via Zoom).
Kathryn Benton on behalf of Church for the Fellowship of All People (via Zoom).
Carl LeRoy Blake, interested party (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Amended Petition for Confirmation of Trust Assets.

Mr. Duran reported that documentation had been submitted in support of the amended petition and that the parties were seeking confirmation of certain assets as trust property.

The Court addressed the assets identified in the petition. The Court stated that the request to confirm the Schwab accounts as trust assets could be granted, noting that the Ameritrade account was listed on Schedule A to the trust and that the Schwab accounts resulted from Schwab's acquisition of Ameritrade. The Court expressed concern regarding the Self-Help Credit Union accounts, noting that they were not listed on Schedule A, were opened several years after creation of the trust, and that there was no evidence of a subsequent transfer into the trust. The Court further noted that the retirement accounts could not have been titled in the name of the trust and that there was no indication that beneficiary designations payable to the trust had been made.

Mr. Duran argued that a pour-over will existed and that, absent confirmation, probate administration would be required despite the lack of objection and the relatively small size of the estate.

Following discussion, the Court took the matter under submission and indicated its intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Confirmation Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Dec-01-2025 Continued To Jan-05-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
